text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is almost here, but for the time
being, rest is what's most necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to incorporate a break into our
schedule since going too hard can be detrimental.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheerful music is playing in the streets and there's
holiday joy in the air.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What a coincidence. Are you by yourself too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'm just walking around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But I think I ran into you at the perfect time,
actually. What are you doing after this?
choice_data_list: I'm looking for something to eat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I see. I think I'll join you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You could say that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I want meat. I'll leave the place to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I end up sharing a meal with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nice choice. The meat's top quality.
choice_data_list: You haven't really touched your veggies...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, you want them? Here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without any hesitation, Narita Brian hands me her
plate.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll just wait till you're done. So, what's next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm? Don't you plan on going anywhere else?
choice_data_list: Well, do you? What's your plan?
Well, do you? What's your plan?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My plan is... just to relax. I don't really have
anything else to do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's the last break before the Arima. I can't afford
to injure myself or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'd rather spend time with you than by
myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
At least with you, we can talk about racing, so I
can still have a productive break. Right?
choice_data_list: That defeats the point of a break.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nah, it doesn't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Talking about racing with you is when I feel most
relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We speak a while more, and by the time we leave
the restaurant, it's already dark outside.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Look at all these lights. The whole world seems
to be in the holiday spirit.
choice_data_list: Yet we're in the racing spirit—same as ever.
Yet we're in the racing spirit—same as ever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's our life.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Just because it's a holiday doesn't mean we have
to do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're here, I'm here, so let's just think about
racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I love this everyday stuff more than
anything else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I have a solid strategy for the Arima. How
about we do a trial run tonight on the academy
track?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not even just one lap?
choice_data_list: Save that energy for the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Stock up and then unleash, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. Then I'll see you at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today turned out to be a fulfilling day of working
toward our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Do you consider me a part of your everyday life?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... I see. I guess it's mutual then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's get back to our everyday life tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian smiles in satisfaction.
